/usr/bin/cc -fPIC   -shared -Wl,-soname,libolei_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so -o libolei_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so CMakeFiles/olei_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/olei_interfaces/msg/detail/vf_header__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/olei_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/olei_interfaces/msg/detail/v2_header__functions.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/foxy/lib: /opt/ros/foxy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/foxy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl
